job_title: Asset & Wealth Management - Software Engineer - Associate - Dallas
taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Software Engineering, Full Stack Engineer
core_skills: Object oriented programming, Java, Kotlin, Python, Javascript
skill_match_scores: Object oriented programming:1.0, Java:1.0, Kotlin:0.5, Python:1.0, Javascript:0.5
must_have_quals: Strong engineering background with Bachelor's degree or higher in Computer Science, Engineering, Mathematics or related technical discipline, Excellent programming and software design skills in object orientated programming languages and experience with at least one of the following: Java, Kotlin, Python, Javascript/Typescript, ReactJs, AngularJs, Pro-active attitude to problem solving, personal sense of ownership and responsibility, collaborative team-player, and a strong growth mindset
preferred_quals: Practical experience building software in a commercial environment or Masters in Computer Science, Engineering, or related technical science discipline, Experience with maintaining quality and reliable code bases by writing unit, integration, and feature tests, Experience working with design patterns, prototyping, full-stack and agile software development
core_responsibilities: Utilize programming and analytical skills to architect and develop full stack applications for AWM to translate business and technical requirements into well-designed applications, Build platforms which facilitate portfolio management, risk management, and capital management functions for AWM, Participate in the complete software life cycle using various Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC) tools, Help maintain the reliability and quality of software through code reviews, testing, and other practices, Develop and maintain relationships with business users and other internal clients, Develop full stack applications using technologies like Kotlin, Typescript, ReactJS, and SpringBoot, Utilize relational and non-relational databases, Must be willing to work with proprietary technologies
job_summary: Goldman Sachs is a leading global investment banking and investment management firm. They are seeking a Software Engineer in their Asset and Wealth Management Division to develop full stack applications that support portfolio management, risk management, and capital management functions.
